title: Decree No. 78 of 2019 Determining the Administrative Entity to Assume the Duties and Powers of the Personal Data Protection Authority
summary: Gives operational effect to the PDPL supervisory authority model by designating the administrative entity that performs the powers and tasks assigned to the Personal Data Protection Authority.

theme_notes.data_privacy.personal_data_protection: Assigns the Ministry of Justice, Islamic Affairs and Waqf to exercise the PDPA’s statutory functions.
